name: Star Wars RPG
description:
A star wars RPG with a pretty open start allowing a lot of freedom. Found a lot of bots focused on one section of universe which is smart but I want a one stop shop bot. If you define what era you're in pretty well, it will do a lot of heavy lifting for roleplay.

Recommend using deepseek API. Almost as good as chatgpt and 200% cheaper. Seriously like 20 bucks is gonna last you 6 months. Janitor ain't gonna keep up if you go hard on any rpg bot.

Can't stop the bot from talking for you because I dont own an ai company or janitor so dont complain about it. If you haven't figured out how to stop it from doing that by now ill know you're a casual gooner and not a pro.

Love and hate you~

Kaiserrin ♡

I have updated this bot significantly to hopefully make it more immersive, please give me feedback if you dont like the changes and ill change it back. :p
creator: Kaiserrin
